wiki.parent: Chow Tai Fook Enterprises Limited, Century Acquisition Limited
wiki.extract:
CTF Services Limited (Chinese: 周大福創建有限公司), (SEHK: 659) is a conglomerate with a diversified portfolio of market-leading businesses, predominantly in Hong Kong and mainland China under Chow Tai Fook Enterprise (CTFE). Operating businesses include toll roads, financial services, logistics, construction and facilities management. 
CTF Services Limited, formerly known as NWS Holdings Limited, was established in 2003 when its predecessor, Pacific Ports Company Limited, acquired New World Services Limited from New World Development and the infrastructure assets from New World Infrastructure Limited.
